P6_resistant_slice.selection_rule: difficulty-stratified largest-remainder over the RESISTANT subset, (contest_date, question_id)-ordered, OUTCOME-BLIND

a0_a1_b_spec.A0: stock single-shot at T=0.0 (1 model call / problem)
a0_a1_b_spec.B: sequential-reflexion-K=5 at T=0.7, each turn conditioned on the cumulative (candidate, executor stderr) history (5 calls)
a0_a1_b_spec.budget: A1 and B are byte-exact K=5; no early-stop; same model on all arms
a0_a1_b_spec.executor_truth: functional public-test block; subprocess exit 0 iff every case matches; NO LLM-as-judge

phase2_gates.G1_slice_pre_committed: slice CID pinned before the run
phase2_gates.G6_per_problem_majority: B did not regress vs A1 on >= 16 of 30

applicability.applicability_reason: CUTOFF_UNKNOWN: cannot certify resistance against a non-KNOWN cutoff (boundary≈2025-07-01; released 2025-07-22; cutoff UNDOCUMENTED; ESTIMATE only — not certification-grade; likely exposed on a 2025-01..04 slice)
CUTOFF_UNKNOWN: cannot certify resistance against a non-KNOWN cutoff (boundary≈2025-01-01; V4 post-dates V3 (2024-12); cutoff UNDOCUMENTED; likely overlaps the 2025-01..04 slice)

CUTOFF_UNKNOWN: cannot certify resistance against a non-KNOWN cutoff (boundary≈2026-03-01; '2603' release tag => 2026-03; cutoff UNDOCUMENTED but POST-dates the entire test6 window => test6 slice EXPOSED for it)

CUTOFF_UNKNOWN: cannot certify resistance against a non-KNOWN cutoff (boundary≈2025-07-01; released 2025-07-22; cutoff UNDOCUMENTED; ESTIMATE only — not certification-grade; likely exposed on a 2025-01..04 slice)
CUTOFF_UNKNOWN: cannot certify resistance against a non-KNOWN cutoff (boundary≈2025-01-01; V4 post-dates V3 (2024-12); cutoff UNDOCUMENTED; likely overlaps the 2025-01..04 slice)

CUTOFF_UNKNOWN: cannot certify resistance against a non-KNOWN cutoff (boundary≈2026-03-01; '2603' release tag => 2026-03; cutoff UNDOCUMENTED but POST-dates the entire test6 window => test6 slice EXPOSED for it)

spend_if_reopens.spend_rule: Tier-2 NIM is spent iff (a) the W113 main-lane verdict earns escalation [RESISTANT_SUPERIORITY_REOPENS -> True] AND (b) >= 1 tier-2 model has a CERTIFIABLY resistant slice [n_certifiable=0], with the same cheap K=5 single-seed budget. Top eligible by ranking = NONE.
spend_if_reopens.next_instrument_if_blocked: All tier-2 cutoffs are UNKNOWN/post-2025 relative to the test6 slice (2025-01..04), so NONE is certifiably resistant on the pinned corpus. The next instrument for any tier-2 follow-up is a LATER date-filtered LiveCodeBench slice (release_v7+) with problems strictly after that model's (first KNOWN) cutoff — operator-fetched + SHA-pinned. Until then, tier-2 spend is BLOCKED on the missing instrument, independent of the main-lane outcome.

The next instrument for any tier-2 follow-up is a LATER date-filtered LiveCodeBench slice (release_v7+) with problems strictly after that model's (first KNOWN) cutoff — operator-fetched + SHA-pinned.
